query:
-- Remover histórico de leads de teste
DELETE FROM lead_history
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    nome LIKE '%Teste%' 
    OR nome LIKE '%Lead Rank%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Roleta%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Webhook%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11777777777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11888888888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11992%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11991%'
    OR email LIKE '%webhook%'
);

-- Remover logs de distribuição
DELETE FROM distribution_log
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    nome LIKE '%Teste%' 
    OR nome LIKE '%Lead Rank%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Roleta%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Webhook%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11777777777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11888888888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11992%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11991%'
    OR email LIKE '%webhook%'
);

-- Remover estoque de leads
DELETE FROM lead_estoque
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    nome LIKE '%Teste%' 
    OR nome LIKE '%Lead Rank%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Roleta%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Webhook%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11777777777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11888888888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11992%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11991%'
    OR email LIKE '%webhook%'
);

-- Remover histórico de atribuições (nome correto)
DELETE FROM historico_atribuicoes
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    nome LIKE '%Teste%' 
    OR nome LIKE '%Lead Rank%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Roleta%'
    OR nome LIKE '%Webhook%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11777777777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11888888888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11992%'
    OR telefone LIKE '11991%'
    OR email LIKE '%webhook%'
);
